scripts.db:apply:local: bash ./scripts/run-with-infisical.sh --env dev --d1-mode local -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-dev --local
scripts.db:apply:remote: bash ./scripts/run-with-infisical.sh --env dev --d1-mode remote -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-dev-remote --remote
scripts.db:apply:staging: bash ./scripts/run-with-infisical.sh --env staging --d1-mode remote -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:apply:prod: bash ./scripts/run-with-infisical.sh --env prod --d1-mode remote -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-prod --remote --env prod
scripts.deploy:staging: bash ./scripts/run-with-infisical.sh --env staging --d1-mode remote -- wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: bash ./scripts/run-with-infisical.sh --env prod --d1-mode remote -- wrangler deploy --env prod
